title: Observatory Baseline
summary: Ada's startup procedures ground the story in concrete scientific routine and establish an operational baseline.

narrative.newInfo: Instrument and workflow baseline is set so later disturbance is measurable, not purely subjective.
narrative.dripHook: A stable procedural world heightens the significance of any micro-breaks in behavior.
narrative.payoffDelivered: World trust reward: observatory context feels tactile and real.
narrative.notes: Readable procedure detail only; avoid jargon block.

rewardTokens.description: Machine-world texture contrasts with home warmth.
Ada's procedural fluency reinforces trust in later interpretation.
